improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for operations and trade. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for business owners and traders. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating Gideon's core value proposition and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure consistent, professional previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the three free searches call-to-action in both meta and OG descriptions reinforces the low-barrier entry point and drives conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant, expert answers for trade and operations. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: Immediately names the product and its purpose, highlights the core benefit (instant expert answers), and creates a clear path to action by mentioning the free trial limit. This reduces confusion and drives conversions by setting expectations upfront.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited searches, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the primary conversion point—the paywall visitors encounter after the free trial. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), it reduces friction and anxiety at the decision moment, helping convert trial users into paying members.
